title: nepeta floccosa subsp. pseudofloccosa
intro: Nepeta floccosa subsp. pseudofloccosa is a subspecies of the Nepeta floccosa plant, commonly known as false fleabane, which is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Nepeta floccosa subsp. pseudofloccosa include relief from respiratory issues such as colds, coughs, and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Nepeta floccosa subsp. pseudofloccosa can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
